name: Secret Harbor Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature before starting.
2. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Mix and blend the crumbs, brown sugar, and butter by hand until combined.
4. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
5. Bake for 10 minutes and set aside.
6. In a large bowl, cream the cream cheese thoroughly.
7. Gradually beat in the first measure of sugar.
8. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
9. Incorporate the first measure of vanilla extract and the first measure of almond extract.
10. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
11. Bake until set (about 35 minutes), then remove from the oven.
12. Increase the oven temperature to 500 degrees Fahrenheit.
13. Mix the sour cream, second measure of sugar, and second measures of vanilla and almond extract.
14. Spread over the cake.
15. Bake for 5 minutes, then cool and chill thoroughly.
16. Remove the rim of the pan and sprinkle shaved chocolate around the edge of the cake.
